purpose_context: Spec Kitty V1 Decision Moments let missions record interview questions locally. The next step is widening — letting a mission owner pull the team in for a decision that needs more input. V1 keeps the control model human-gated (LLM may suggest, human confirms) and the inference model local-first (Claude Code / Codex summarize fetched discussion; SaaS is pure state transport). This mission adds the CLI-side UX: the [w] affordance, audience review/trim, interview pause semantics (per-question block or continue, default block), candidate review via [a/e/d], and the local-answer-closes-Slack path.
purpose_tldr: Add CLI Widen Mode — an inline affordance during charter/specify/plan interviews that lets the mission owner escalate an interview question to Teamspace collaboration via Slack, then review a locally-summarized discussion and write back the approved answer.
source_description: CLI Widen Mode + Decision Moment write-back loop. Integrates with spec-kitty-saas #110 (widen endpoint + audience-default API) and #111 (Slack orchestration + discussion transcript fetch). Issue: spec-kitty#758.
